behavior_summary: U8P_FISH2::look is a U8P_FISH2::look/examine handler that emits a single short bark 'fish' when the player examines the entity and then suspends the process.
No game flags, parameters, or local variables are read or written by this handler.
The handler is minimal and contains no branching or menu logic; its sole effect is to produce a descriptive/ambient line for the actor.
notable_control_flow: U8P_FISH2::look calls external Bark to display the text 'fish'.
Immediately after Bark, U8P_FISH2::look calls external suspend to yield/terminate the U8P_FISH2::look process.
There are no conditional branches, loops, or flag manipulations in this process.
open_questions: Whether the target of the U8P_FISH2::look process is an NPC or an item instance is inferred from the process type but not explicit in the script; it 'appears' to be an examineable actor.
Any surrounding engine-managed context (which actor handle is passed as 'this') is not shown in the snippet and is therefore assumed from process classification.

main_function.name: U8P_FISH2::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short descriptive bark when the player examines the entity; then suspend the process.
entry_conditions: Invoked when the player uses the 'U8P_FISH2::look' (examine) action on the associated entity (inferred from process type 0x0208 and function classification).

function_map.name: U8P_FISH2::look
function_map.role: U8P_FISH2::look/examine handler — emits a single bark and then suspends

function_map.name: Bark
function_map.role: engine/UI call to display a short speech/bark line to the player

function_map.name: suspend
function_map.role: engine call to suspend or yield the running script/process

external_calls.purpose: Display the short text 'fish' to the player as the entity's U8P_FISH2::look description/bark.
Yield or terminate the U8P_FISH2::look process immediately after emitting the bark.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_FISH2::look is a U8P_FISH2::look/examine handler that emits a single short bark 'fish' when the player examines the entity and then suspends the process.
